zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth de Hastings於大約1270年出生在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾波迪夏馬時，她的父親Henry de Hastings 1st Baron Hastings36歲，母親Joane de Cantilupe30歲。她於1286年與John de Vaux III - Lord of Dirleton在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1330年在威爾士丹比爾盧享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth de Hastings于大约1270年出生在英国英格兰坎布利其爾波迪夏馬时，她的父亲Henry de Hastings 1st Baron Hastings36岁，母亲Joane de Cantilupe30岁。她于1286年与John de Vaux III - Lord of Dirleton在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1330年在威尔士丹比爾盧享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hastings
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from Hastings (Sussex), near which the English army was defeated by the Normans in 1066. The placename derives from an Old English personal name Hǣsta + the Old English groupname suffix -ingas. In the latter part of the 12th century, at the time of William the Lion, the surname was taken to Scotland, where it assimilated instances of the native Scottish surname Harestane.
English: variant of Hasting with Middle English genitival -s.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hOistín ‘descendant of Oistín’, the Gaelic form of the personal name Augustine (see Austin ).

variants.name: Hasting
meanings: English: from the Norman personal name Hastang, Hastenc, Hasten (Old Norse Hásteinn ‘high’ + ‘stone’). See also Hastings .

variants.name: Heston
meanings: English: habitational name from Heston (Middlesex) or Histon (Cambridgeshire). The Middlesex placename derives from Old English hǣs ‘brushwood’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, while the Cambridgeshire placename may derive from Old English hyse ‘shoot, tendril’, also ‘son, youth’, + tūn.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth de Hastings was born about 1270, in Bottisham, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Henry de Hastings 1st Baron Hastings, was 36 and her mother, Joane de Cantilupe, was 30. She married John de Vaux III - Lord of Dirleton in 1286, in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1330, in Ruthin, Denbighshire, Wales, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth de Hastings est née environ 1270, à Bottisham, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Henry de Hastings 1st Baron Hastings, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Joane de Cantilupe, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé John de Vaux III - Lord of Dirleton en 1286, à Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1330, à Ruthin, Denbighshire, Galles, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth de Hastings um 1270 in Bottisham, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry de Hastings 1st Baron Hastings 36 und ihre Mutter Joane de Cantilupe 30. Sie hat 1286 in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom John de Vaux III - Lord of Dirleton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1330 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Ruthin, Denbighshire, Wales.

Lei sposato John de Vaux III - Lord of Dirleton nel 1286, nel Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Hastingsが約1270年にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアボッティシャムで生まれた時，父Henry de Hastings 1st Baron Hastingsは36歳，母Joane de Cantilupeは30歳であった。1286年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドでJohn de Vaux III - Lord of Dirletonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1330年にウェールズデンビグhシュアイアルスインで61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Hastings(이)가 대략 1270년 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 벗티샤에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry de Hastings 1st Baron Hastings(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joane de Cantilupe(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1286년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드에서 John de Vaux III - Lord of Dirleton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1330년 웨일스 덴비그h실르 루스인에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth de Hastings родилась около 1270 г. в местности боттишам, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Henry de Hastings 1st Baron Hastings было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Joane de Cantilupe, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Vaux III - Lord of Dirleton в 1286 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1330 г. в местности рутин, денбаишир, Уэльс в возрасте 61 год.
